title: Realtime subscription causing query parameter conflicts
symptom: Multiple users accessing the same WeWeb page with different URL parameters experience conflicts, as the query parameters are overwritten by the Realtime subscription.
applies_when: Multiple users accessing the same base URL
not_this_if: Each user has a unique session management system
root_cause: The WeWeb platform subscribes to entire tables with Realtime enabled by default, which causes it to listen to all changes in the table instead of filtering based on individual user sessions. This leads to overwriting of query parameters when multiple users access the same page.
fix_steps: Go to the plugin settings in WeWeb.
Turn off the Realtime feature for the WeWeb plugin.
Manually manage Realtime subscriptions using JavaScript as needed.
agent_instruction: Disable the Realtime feature in the WeWeb plugin settings and manage subscriptions manually with JavaScript.
